metadata.purpose: Track every property through Patrick's deal pipeline. Learning loop for the property finder.

historical.note: Pre-finder deals purchased through Lindia (for pattern reference)

deals.notes: Won after complex negotiation. Initially $95K, passed after inspection, re-offered at $90K, settled $85K. Roof replaced by seller.
Market rate tenant at $1,400/mo. Recently passed municipal inspection.

deals.address: 12368 Santa Maria Dr, Saint Louis, MO 63138
deals.notes: Slab property. Foreclosure. $5K rehab estimate. Patrick's 70-80/100 benchmark. Cap rate 13.5-16.16%.
S8 occupied. Listed same day Patrick found it. Quick move.

pipeline.why: Strong $1,051/mo noi. excellent 17.3% cap rate. priced at just $73,000
Strong $1,000/mo noi. excellent 15.3% cap rate. turnkey ready
Strong $1,042/mo noi. excellent 14.7% cap rate. turnkey ready
Strong $1,030/mo noi. excellent 15.6% cap rate. turnkey ready
Solid $992/mo noi. excellent 14.5% cap rate. turnkey ready
Solid $958/mo noi. excellent 15.3% cap rate. priced at just $75,000
Solid $857/mo noi. excellent 14.3% cap rate. priced at just $72,000
Priced at just $70,000. turnkey ready. slab foundation

learning_log.property: 10726 Glen Garry Rd, Saint Louis, MO 63137
learning_log.feedback: Currently rented at $1,000/mo — good security but below S8 benchmark. Would need to evict after lease expiry and re-let through S8 at $1,300+. Property itself looks very solid. Finder underscored.
rules_learned: Current rent below $1,300 is a flag but not a deal-killer if property is solid
Tenant in place = security, but S8 re-let timeline must be factored

learning_log.feedback: Full rehab needed. No internal photos = massive unknowns. Likely needs significant roof work + compliance improvements for S8. Too many variables. Good purchase price allows repair bandwidth but unknown costs likely blow out 24-week timeline. Better off finding turnkey.
rules_learned: Full rehab in listing = heavy score penalty (-15 to -20)
No internal photos = automatic penalty (-10)
Unknown repair scope = timeline risk penalty
Turnkey properties strongly preferred over rehab projects

learning_log.feedback: Looks good on paper. Garage should be locked from tenant (not S8 income factor, liability risk). No internal photos limits assessment. Exterior cladding shows fatigue = potential water leakage. Cladding fatigue = likely roof issues too. Financial metrics work, location works. 70/100 pending more info.
rules_learned: Garage = lock from tenant access (liability, not income-producing for S8)
Exterior cladding fatigue = connected to roof condition
No internal photos = score is conditional/pending
Financial metrics + location working = solid foundation even with unknowns

learning_log.feedback: Already inspected by Lindia. Renovations looked good on paper but were very cheap in person. Still needs significant work. Ugly. Not S8-compliance ready. 1638 sqft is too big — ideal target is <1200 sqft. Hard pass.
rules_learned: Sqft cap: target <1200 sqft (not just upper bound, ideal). 1600+ sqft = penalty/exclude
Cheap renovations in-person despite paper-quality = recurring Lindia signal — apply higher trust to her in-person assessment over listing photos
Always cross-check finder candidates against excluded-properties.json before surfacing

learning_log.delta: DEAL FINDER FAILURE — RESURFACED A REJECTED PROPERTY
learning_log.feedback: Garry deal-finder-v4 surfaced Mary Ave at #3 score 80 despite Patrick already having walked from this property post-inspection. excluded_properties array exists in pipeline but finder isn't consulting it. ROOT CAUSE FIX REQUIRED: deal-finder-v4 must hard-filter against excluded_properties[].address before scoring.
rules_learned: Deal finder MUST consult excluded_properties[] AND project_active_acquisition_pipeline.md DEAD column before surfacing any property
Properties Patrick walked from post-inspection = permanent exclude, never re-show
Audit pass needed: scan all of Garry's recent deal-finder outputs for any address that's been previously rejected

learning_log.feedback: Three structural reasons to pass: (1) Ferguson zip 63135 = population below the 80k S8 Pro threshold, S8 demand depth too thin for long-term occupancy. (2) 28 shootings within 1mi radius — crime risk too high. (3) Visible roof sagging in listing photos. (4) 3BR — Patrick prefers 4BR. The 'OK cash flow' on the deal does not compensate for the stacked risk+location+bedroom-count drag.
rules_learned: BEDROOM RULE: Prefer 4BR over 3BR. 3BR with only OK cash flow = pass. 3BR is acceptable only if cash flow is exceptional AND location is best-tier.
FERGUSON / 63135 RULE: Population <80k = S8 Pro flags as 'Bad' for Location & Neighborhood Suitability. Treat 63135 (Ferguson) as a hard-penalty zip — most properties there should not surface.
CRIME THRESHOLD: 25+ shootings within 1mi radius (recent year) = automatic pass regardless of financials.
VISIBLE ROOF SAGGING in listing photos = exclude or hard-penalize. Do not surface as candidate.

learning_log.feedback: Surfaced as #1 because cached sqft=0 (missing data) and 4BR boosted score. Patrick excluded — too big. Reinforces existing rule: sqft missing = MUST fetch from Zillow before scoring, OR exclude. Also: 4BR/3BA layout is a tell for oversized — target 4BR/1BA, max 2BA.
rules_learned: sqft=0 or missing = NEVER surface as top pick. Either fetch live from Zillow OR auto-exclude.
4BR/3BA = oversized red flag. Target is 4BR/1BA, occasionally 4BR/2BA. 3+ baths = exclude.
Patrick's hard sqft cap reaffirmed: 900-1200 ideal, anything >1500 sqft = penalty, >2000 = exclude.

learning_log.property: 1427 Fairmeadows Ln, Saint Louis, MO 63138 (soft pass)
learning_log.feedback: Patrick reviewed live Zillow. 169 days on market (stale). Tenanted with NO rent rate disclosed. Listing says 'showings with accepted offer only' (blocks pre-offer inspection). 'Sold as-is, no repairs/inspections by seller'. No S8 mention = likely market-rate tenant requiring eviction + S8 re-lease. Soft pass — not excluded forever but deprioritized.
rules_learned: DOM > 90 days = warning flag (-10 score). >150 days = harder penalty (-20).
Tenanted property without disclosed rent rate = eviction risk + cash flow unknown = penalty.
Listing says 'showings with accepted offer only' = no pre-offer inspection = HARD penalty (Patrick won't make blind binding offers).
Listing says 'sold as-is, no inspections by seller' = penalty (signals seller knows there's stuff wrong).
Listing missing the words 'Section 8' / 'voucher' / 'HCV' but tenanted = assume market-rate, need to model 30-60 day eviction + re-lease lag in cash flow.

excluded_properties.exclusion_reason: HARD PASS FOREVER — too big (1638 sqft vs <1200 target), cheap renos in-person per Lindia, ugly, not S8 compliant
ALREADY REJECTED — offer was in, did inspection, did not inspect well. Walked. Should never resurface.
excluded_properties.excluded_by: Patrick (deal finder leak — Mary Ave was already in DEAD column of project_active_acquisition_pipeline.md)

excluded_properties.exclusion_reason: PASS — Ferguson location (population <80k S8 Pro threshold), 28 shootings within 1mi (last 03/14/26), roof shows sagging, only 3BR. Cash flow OK but risk + location + 3BR marginality push it to a pass.
TOO BIG — Patrick: 'way too big, twice as big as we want.' Target 900-1200 sqft, this is ~2400+ sqft territory. 4BR/3BA layout = oversized for S8 single-family.

HARD PASS — shootings on Garesche Ave directly (59XX Garesche Apr 18 + Apr 21 2026). Crime on same block = instant exclusion. Also: detached garage + partially finished attic + full basement adds squatter/maintenance risk with zero income upside.

watchlist.pros: Proven 63135 zip (same as Fenwick), clean interior, decent kitchen, 3 proper bedrooms on main floor
watchlist.cons: 3BR only (prefers 4BR), garage has internal access to basement (can't lock separately), slope/retaining wall concern, 2017 rental history $850/mo (likely $1,000-$1,100 now vs $1,442 floor needed), 26 shootings/mile
watchlist.notes: Would only work at lower price OR if current rent is higher than Zillow history suggests. Need lease info to confirm.

watchlist.pros: 4BR, 63138 Spanish Lake, decent neighborhood street view, crime 16/mile, HQS Good, manageable condition
watchlist.cons: Tenant-occupied as-is — need current rent and lease expiry. Floor plan suggests only 2BR main floor + basement. Need to confirm all 4BR are HQS-compliant with egress.
watchlist.notes: HOLD — compile with other watchlist properties and route through Lindia to get lease info from listing agent.
